testcase.name: test_calendar_shows_blocked_dates_after_booking

failure.message:
AssertionError: Booked date should be blocked. Got status=AVAILABLE, can_check_in=True assert ('AVAILABLE' == 'BLOCKED'
- BLOCKED + AVAILABLE or not True)

testcase.failure: test_reports/pytest/test_booking_flow_rls_v23.py:181: in test_calendar_shows_blocked_dates_after_booking assert check_in_day["status"] == "BLOCKED" or not check_in_day["can_check_in"], \ E AssertionError: Booked date should be blocked. Got status=AVAILABLE, can_check_in=True E assert ('AVAILABLE' == 'BLOCKED' E E - BLOCKED E + AVAILABLE or not True)
